title: Urgent Crown Development application: Manston Initial Triage and Processing Centre, Reception Centre and Training Facility
body: " Ref number: PCU/RARE/Z2260/3368364  Proposal: Retrospective planning permission for an Initial Triage Processing Centre and full planning permission for a temporary training facility and modular buildings for processing, permanent Processing Centre and training facility and associated works at Manston, Kent.    Address: Former RAF Manston, Manston Road, Ramsgate, Kent, CT12 5BS  Applicant: Home Office  Date validated: 22 October 2025  Status: Consultation period  For further information please contact: Crowncasework@communities.gov.uk  Documents: Documents, plans and drawings relating to application are found below.  These application documents are available to be physically inspected at Thanet District Council’s offices at Thanet Gateway Plus, Cecil Street, Margate, CT9 1XZ.   Application for planning permission             Application for planning permission    PDF, 2.74 MB, 14 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email alternativeformats@communities.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.
